{{Quote|By Tion's spleen—hour after hour, they whine and they wail, like those tone-deaf fanes of Xo! Just gag it or die already, and allow us all some rest! If you cravens even knew who I was…|[[Xim/Legends|Xim]], in the [[The Cry of the Evocii|third episode]] of the play [[Evocar (play)|''Evocar'']]|<ref name="Evocar">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/ximweek05/index.html|text=Xim Week: ''The Despotica'' (Part IV: ''Evocar'')|int=Xim Week: The Despotica}}</ref>}}
'''Tion''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Geography==
The world that gave the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] its name was one of its minor planets. Tion was largely [[Waterworld/Legends|covered]] by a world-spanning [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] and [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] two brilliant cyan [[Star/Legends|stars]]. The planet was also orbited by three industrialized [[Moon/Legends|moons]], with one of them hosting a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]].<ref name="Xim Week" />

==History==
{{Quote|Just as Xim's life befuddles historical corroboration, so does his end—and ''The Despotica'' invites a galaxy of possibilities. Basel of Tion and the holowright of holowrights himself, Peshosloc, both have Xim, in their versions, perishing after the Third Battle. Direus'pei, on the other hand, keeps Xim alive, shackled in the dungeons of Evocar, which did not fall under Hutt control until 10,000 years after Xim's time.|[[Professor/Legends|Professor]] [[S. V. Skynx/Legends|S. V. Skynx]], ''[[The Despotica Reader]]'', [[The Despotica Reader, Third Edition|Third Edition]]|<ref name="Despotica">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/ximweek02/index.html|text=Xim Week: ''The Despotica'' (Part I)|int=Xim Week: The Despotica}}</ref>}}
One of the worlds of the [[Kingdom of Cron]], Tion was absorbed into [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]]. After the fall of the empire in [[25,100 BBY]]. After the empire collapsed, the planet would continue to thrive as a world of the [[Honorable Union of Desevro and Tion]], eventually becoming part of the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] when the Tion Cluster joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="Xim Week" />

In the Republic's final years, the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] worlds joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] and would later become a part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Xim Week" />
